nasb.text: That is why I came without even raising any objection when I was sent for. So I ask for what reason you have sent for me.”

esv.text: So when I was sent for, I came without objection. I ask then why you sent for me.”

cnv.text: 所以我一被邀請，就毫不推辭地來了。現在請問：你們請我來是為甚麼事？”

ccb.text: 所以，我受到邀请后，毫不犹豫地来了。请问你们为什么请我来？”

csbs.text: 所以我一受邀请，没有推辞就来了。那么请问，你们请我来有什么事呢？”
